title: Decathlon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Decathlon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Decathlon India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Decathlon India Advisory Limited:
Decathlon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India Advisory Limited!
